description: Template MCP server configuration for Team Skills Platform and ECC harness skeleton.

servers.name: github
servers._comment: Setup: npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-github. Requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in env.
args: Not configured - set up via: npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-github

servers.name: vercel
servers._comment: Setup: npx @vercel/mcp. Requires VERCEL_TOKEN in env.
args: Not configured - set up via: npx @vercel/mcp

servers.name: database
servers._comment: Setup: npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres or equivalent. Requires DATABASE_URL in env.
args: Not configured - set up via: npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres
